title: schoenoplectus litoralis subsp. thermalis
intro: Schoenoplectus litoralis subsp. thermalis, also known as the thermal bulrush, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the cattail family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of Schoenoplectus litoralis subsp. thermalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
